user.title: Set up YouTube Now Playing
user.description: Choose whether to create one common now playing sensor without selecting an Apple TV. Leave this off to configure a specific Apple TV media player instead.

data.create_standalone_sensor: Create common YouTube Now Playing sensor

data_description.create_standalone_sensor: Creates one shared sensor, sensor.youtube_now_playing, that is not tied to an Apple TV.

standalone.title: Set up common sensor
standalone.description: The common sensor polls YouTube history on this interval. Updates can still lag behind playback when YouTube history itself is delayed.

data_description.cookie_file: Path inside Home Assistant, for example /config/.youtube_cookies.txt.
data_description.poll_interval_seconds: How often sensor.youtube_now_playing polls YouTube history, in seconds.

media_player.title: Set up Apple TV artwork patching
media_player.description: Select an Apple TV media player to patch its artwork while it is playing YouTube.

data_description.cookie_file: Path inside Home Assistant, for example /config/.youtube_cookies.txt.
data_description.youtube_app_id: Leave blank to store no fixed app ID. The suggested value is com.google.ios.youtube.

error.invalid_media_player: Select a media_player entity provided by the Apple TV integration.

abort.already_configured: This YouTube Now Playing target is already configured.

init.title: YouTube Now Playing settings
init.description: Update the optional Apple TV media player, YouTube cookie file, polling interval, or optional YouTube app ID.

data_description.media_player_entity_id: When set, the integration follows this Apple TV and patches its entity picture. Clear it to use the common sensor only.
data_description.cookie_file: Path inside Home Assistant, for example /config/.youtube_cookies.txt.
data_description.poll_interval_seconds: Used by the common sensor when no Apple TV media player is selected.
data_description.youtube_app_id: Leave blank to store no fixed app ID. The suggested value is com.google.ios.youtube.

error.invalid_media_player: Select a media_player entity provided by the Apple TV integration.

youtube_cookie_problem.title: YouTube cookies need to be refreshed
youtube_cookie_problem.description:
YouTube Now Playing could not read watch history with the configured cookie file.

Cookie file: `{cookie_file}`

Error: `{error}`

Export fresh YouTube cookies to the same file, then open this repair and submit it to check again. The repair also clears automatically after the next successful fetch.

confirm.title: Check refreshed YouTube cookies
confirm.description:
Replace the cookie file, then submit to check YouTube history again.

Cookie file: `{cookie_file}`

Last error: `{error}`

error.still_invalid: YouTube history still could not be read. Refresh the cookie file and try again.

abort.entry_not_found: The YouTube Now Playing entry for this repair is no longer loaded.
